prompt: Create a concise decision deck for a six-week pilot and add the optional E6 executive review overlay.

slides.body: A bounded launch gives the team real usage evidence while preserving a clear stop condition.
slides.callout: Decision requested: authorize a six-week pilot with weekly quality reviews.

slides.title: The pilot captures learning without committing the full organization

left.heading: What we gain
left.body: Observed adoption, workflow friction, measurable time savings, and a prioritized repair backlog.

right.heading: What we contain
right.body: Scope, access, support load, data exposure, and the cost of reversing course.

runs.text: and stop when it is not.

slides.subtitle: Publish weekly adoption, formatting-quality, and cleanup-time measures; pause expansion after any unresolved critical defect.
